svg.title: Complete working process of an AI Agent with an LLM
svg.desc: A detailed flowchart showing every layer of an AI agent — from user input through the LLM reasoning core, tool execution, feedback loop, and final response delivery.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user input layer do in an AI agent?')
sendPrompt('What goes inside a system prompt for an AI agent?')
sendPrompt('How does memory work in an AI agent?')
sendPrompt('What is context assembly in an AI agent?')
sendPrompt('How does tokenization work inside an LLM?')
sendPrompt('What are embeddings inside an LLM?')
sendPrompt('What happens inside the transformer layers of an LLM?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM generate a thought or plan before acting?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI agent select which tool to use?')
sendPrompt('What happens during tool execution in an AI agent?')
sendPrompt('What tools can an AI agent use for web search?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI agent execute code?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI agent call external APIs?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI agent read and write files?')
sendPrompt('What is the observation step in an AI agent feedback loop?')
g.text: Read tool result — success, data, or error

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does an AI agent reflect on its own reasoning?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI agent detect and correct its own errors?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI agent decide when a goal is complete?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI agent format its final response?')
g.text: Structure output — text, JSON, markdown, table

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does an AI agent deliver its final answer to the user?')
sendPrompt('How does an AI agent update its memory after completing a task?')

svg.text: Legend — click any box to learn more
Dashed outlines = logical layer groupings (not physical components)
Left loop = agent re-plans when goal is not yet met
